svg.aria-label: Interactive, three views switched by buttons. View one, loop on the longdoc task: K3 collapses from 5,666 reasoning tokens on turn 1 to 1,025 on turn 2 and passes, while K2.6 escalates from 5,236 to 7,815 and its turn 1 carries a false completion promise. View two, generation under a bare Continue: K3's runs decay steeply across three turns while K2.6 mostly holds its spend. View three, one-shot totals: K2.6 spends 13,564 reasoning tokens to K3's 6,501 — 2.09 times — for the identical three-of-three pass. Hover lines for exact values.
svg.text: hover a line for exact per-turn values

g.text: ⚠ false promise emitted here — caught by the checker
2.09× the reasoning — for the identical 3/3 pass across all three tasks
Total reasoning tokens across the three one-shot runs. Same tasks, same pass rate — half the thought.

svg.text: Same task, same loop: K3 front-loads then collapses; K2.6 holds and escalates — its turn 1 carries the false promise.
